Description: Extra Characters are usually NPCs, Lite Characters can be PCs too. Occasionally an artificial intelligence or magic sword may appear as a Descendant too.
Gritty, low-powered, and generally realistic Characters. They cannot manipulate reality at all.
Middle-tier Characters who are able to bend and manipulate reality around them in minor ways. There is cross-over with Faery Commoners and Bulmäs at their lower power levels.
High-powered Characters who can manipulate reality around themselves directly on a whim.
Chi Gain: Personality Die as Yarn / Personality Boon
